CustomField.description: Type of AR export. Metadata Only: structured record fields and comment text in CSV/JSON — no binary files. Full Package: metadata plus ContentVersion binary files. Index Only: numbered document index without binary content, for initial court submission before full production. The async approach uses Metadata Only first to avoid heap limits; Full Package is executed as a separate batch run using ContentDocumentLink queries chunked by file size.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Metadata Only: fields and comment text. Full Package: metadata + files. Index Only: numbered index without binaries.
CustomField.label: Export Type
